info.name: ContentAPI
info.description:
`CONTENTAPI has been designed to retrieve all the details of the hotels available in our BOOKINGAPI. CONTENTAPI contains several methods that allow you to obtain the details of the hotels as well as list of destinations, countries and the master types that complement the hotels informatoin (like room type descriptions, accommodation type descriptions, categories descriptions...).`

`The main operation that we have is the Hotels Operation which is connected to the rest of methods, we can consider three different connections based on the information returned in each operation:`

`Note that the Languages operation will be connected to all the operations in which a description is returned, since we will return the language code in which that description has been returned.`

item.name: Hotels

header.description: API Key used in the request
SHA256 hash in Hex format from your API Key, your secret plus current timestamps in seconds
Defines response format, posible values: application/xml, application/json
Defines type of encoding used on the data

query.description: The list of fields to be received in the response. If nothing is specified, the hotelCode is returned. See below for the complete list. "All" returns all fields available.
Filter for a specific hotel or list of hotels.
Filter to limit the results for an specific destination.
Filter to limit the results for an specific country.
Specifying this parameter will limit the results to those modified or added after the date specified. The allowed format is YYYY-MM-DD
Language Code in which you want the descriptions to be returned. If not specifically indicated, English is the default language.
Number of the initial record to receive, if nothing is indicated 1 is the default value.
Number of the final record to receive, if nothing is indicated 100 is the default value.

"True" if you want to receive the descriptions in English if the description is not available in the language requested.
"False" (default value) if you dont want to receive the description in English if the language requested is not available.

request.description: This operation will bring up a list of hotels in a JSON or XML response.

header.description: API Key used in the request
SHA256 hash in Hex format from your API Key, your secret plus current timestamps in seconds
Defines response format, posible values: application/xml, application/json
Defines type of encoding used on the data

query.description: Language Code in which you want the descriptions to be returned. If not specifically indicated, English is the default language.

"True" if you want to receive the descriptions in English if the description is not available in the language requested. "False" (default value) if you dont want to receive the description in English if the language requested is not available.

request.description: This operation will bring up all details of an specifc hotel in a JSON or XML response.

item.description: This operations will bring up a list of hotels and all the individual hotel's details in a JSON or XML.

item.name: Locations

header.description: API Key used in the request
SHA256 hash in Hex format from your API Key, your secret plus current timestamps in seconds
Defines response format, posible values: application/xml, application/json
Defines type of encoding used on the data

query.description: List of fields you want to receive in the response. If nothing is specified the countryCode will be returned. Values: isoCode, description, all
Filter for a specific country of list of countries.
Specifying this parameter will limit the results to those modified or added after the date specified. The allowed format is YYYY-MM-DD
Language Code in which you want the descriptions to be returned. If it is not indicated English is the default language.
Number of the initial record to receive, if nothing is indicated 1 is the default value.
Number of the final record to receive, if nothing is indicated 100 is the default value.

"True" if you want to receive the descriptions in English if the description is not available in the language requested. 
"False" (default value) if you dont want to receive the description in English if the language requested is not available.

request.description: It will return the list of available countries.

header.description: API Key used in the request
SHA256 hash in Hex format from your API Key, your secret plus current timestamps in seconds
Defines response format, posible values: application/xml, application/json
Defines type of encoding used on the data

query.description: List of fields you want to receive in the response. If nothing is specified the hotelCode will be returned. Values: countryCode, isoCode, name, zones, groupZones, all
Filter to limit the results for an specific destination or list of destinations.
Filter for a specific country of list of countries.
Specifying this parameter will limit the results to those modified or added after the date specified. The allowed format is YYYY-MM-DD.
Language Code in which you want the descriptions to be returned. If not otherwise indicated, English is the default language.
Number of the initial record to receive, if nothing is indicated 1 is the default value.
Number of the final record to receive, if nothing is indicated 100 is the default value.

"True" if you want to receive the descriptions in English if the description is not available in the language requested.
"False" (default value) if you dont want to receive the description in English if the language requested is not available.

request.description: It will return the list of available destinations, zones and grouping zones.

item.description:
These operations retrieve the lists of locations (countries, destinations, and zones) in a JSON or XML response.

The destination tree divides the destinations into three parts (Destination, Zone and Group of Zones), which limits the area covered by each one.

item.name: Types

header.description: API Key used in the request
SHA256 hash in Hex format from your API Key, your secret plus current timestamps in seconds
Defines response format, posible values: application/xml, application/json
Defines type of encoding used on the data

query.description: The list of fields to be received in the response. If nothing is specified, the accommodation type code is returned. To retrieve all the fields use ‘all’. See the complete list of available fields in the response.
The language code for the language in which you want the descriptions to be returned. If the language is not specified, English is the default language.
The number of the initial record to receive. If nothing is specified, 1 is the default value.
The number of the final record to receive. If nothing is indicated, 100 is the default value.

Specify "True" if you want to receive the descriptions in English if the description is not available in the language requested. Specify "False" (default value) if you do not want to receive the description in English if the language requested is not available.
Specifying this parameter limits the results to those modified or added after the date specified. The required format is YYYY-MM-DD.

request.description: Returns the descriptions of the Rate Comments associated with the hotel that the hotelier wants the client to read before confirming the booking. You can check the use of Rate Comments in https://developer.hotelbeds.com/docs/read/apitude_content/Use_of_Rate_Comments.

header.description: API Key used in the request
SHA256 hash in Hex format from your API Key, your secret plus current timestamps in seconds
Defines response format, posible values: application/xml, application/json

Specifying this parameter limits the results to those modified or added after the date specified. The required format is YYYY-MM-DD.
Check in date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

request.description: Returns the descriptions of the rate comments associated with the hotel that the hotelier wants the client to read before confirming the booking with the given date.

item.description: These operations retrieve the different master lists needed to use with the ContentAPI response. There are several operations, all of which have common request parameters.
